notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for has either been removed or doesn't exist.
notFound.bodySecondary: Thanks to its unique network of partners, My Handler draws on its expertise and travel experience to deliver the best solutions for your events.

intro.tagline: My Handler is a bespoke agency specialising in strategic guidance, creative production, and meticulous execution. We partner closely with our clients to turn their ideas into experiences.
intro.missionBody: Every project deserves a tailored approach. We bring the insight, creativity, and expertise to shape ideas into solutions built around you.
intro.commitmentBody: From concept development to execution and post-event follow-up, we oversee every stage with care and precision. Our commitment is to build lasting partnerships and consistently deliver experiences.

services.heading: Services
services.introBody: We design tailored experiences that blend strategic thinking, operational excellence, and creative sensibility. Every project is handled with discretion, adaptability, and uncompromising attention to detail.

consultancy.title: Consultancy
consultancy.body: We provide strategic and creative guidance to transform ideas into clear, impactful experiences. From concept development to project positioning, we help our clients define direction, uncover opportunities, and bring ambitious visions to life with clarity and purpose.

events.title: Events
events.body: We create and produce exceptional events designed with precision and intention. From private celebrations to brand activations and exclusive gatherings, we oversee every stage — creative direction, production, logistics, and execution — to ensure a seamless and memorable experience.
events.alt: Luxury event table prepared for guests

travel.title: Travel
travel.body: We curate tailor-made travel experiences shaped around each client's lifestyle, preferences, and expectations. Every itinerary is thoughtfully designed to combine exclusivity, comfort, and effortless organization, with access to unique destinations and carefully selected experiences.
travel.alt: Private travel experience above the clouds

conciergerie.title: Conciergerie
conciergerie.body: Our conciergerie service offers dedicated, discreet, and highly personalized assistance. From everyday arrangements to exceptional requests, we anticipate needs, manage details, and provide seamless support designed to simplify and elevate every aspect of our clients' lives.

about.introBody: Each team member contributes a unique perspective, specialized expertise, and a deep understanding of how to create experiences that feel both seamless and meaningful.
about.teamTagline: My Handler brings together a collective of professionals from diverse industries and creative disciplines — including hospitality, luxury services, marketing, music, production, logistics, communication, and event management.
about.teamBody1: What defines our team is not only our complementary backgrounds, but the way we collaborate. We combine creativity with precision, intuition with organization, and strategic thinking with genuine human connection. This multidisciplinary approach allows us to adapt to every project with flexibility, sensitivity, and attention to detail.
about.teamBody2: Above all, we believe exceptional experiences begin with understanding people. We listen, anticipate, and build relationships grounded in trust, care, and discretion. By bringing together our expertise, we transform ideas into carefully crafted realities designed to exceed expectations.

philosophy.heading: Our Philosophy
philosophy.firstParagraph: My Handler envisions a company in which each member can access and enjoy a unique workplace that enables them to achieve their goals, improve their skills and contribute to improving the events and travel industry.
philosophy.secondParagraph: We believe in a place where we can have a positive impact through a balance between social, environmental and economic responsibility.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.body: My Handler is rooted in trust. It forms the foundation of every relationship we build and sits at the core of everything we do.

goodwill.title: Goodwill
goodwill.body: Is equally central to how we operate. Respect, openness, and growth are central to how we operate. They bring clarity, fairness, and balance to every situation.

boldness.title: Boldness
boldness.body: Is what sets us apart. It drives us toward the future, fuels the emergence of new projects, and inspires artistic creation and renewal. Through boldness, the realm of possibility expands.

beauty.title: Beauty
beauty.body: Is both a personal and a structuring value. It reflects our pursuit of meaning, harmony, and excellence. Beauty guides how we create and support our clients, elevating every experience and deepening every emotion.
